channel.title: 调优 on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in 调优 on William Fang

item.title: tuned/tuned adm 系统调优工具
item.description: tuned 是服务，需要使用 tuned-adm 打开工具进行操作。 安装 CentOs sudo yum install tuned 启动 --------------- On RHEL/CentOS 7 --------------- # systemctl start tuned # systemctl enable tuned # systemctl status tuned # systemctl stop tuned Ubuntu sudo apt install tuned 调优 显示当前可用的调优方案 tuned-adm list Available
